name: SELECTIVE INSURANCE GROUP INC
summary: PART I . Overview Selective Insurance Group, Inc. ("Parent") is a New Jersey insurance holding company incorporated in 1977. It owns ten property and casualty insurance subsidiaries ("Insurance Subsidiaries") that sell products and services only in the United States ("U.S.") and exclusively through independent insurance agents and wholesale brokers.
